name: Apple Inc.
overview_text: Apple Inc. is a leading American multinational technology company that designs, manufactures, and markets consumer electronics, software, and online services, best known for its ecosystem of premium products like iPhone, Mac, iPad, and services such as Apple Music and iCloud. It holds a dominant position in premium consumer technology with a focus on innovation, design, and user experience.
headquarters_address: Apple Park, One Apple Park Way, Cupertino, California 95014, USA
operating_countries: United States; China; United Kingdom; Germany; Japan; India; Australia; Canada; France; Italy (and many more, operates in over 100 countries via stores and sales)
office_count: Hundreds of corporate offices and 540+ retail stores globally
office_locations: Cupertino, California, United States; Austin, Texas, United States; Cork, Ireland; London, United Kingdom; Singapore; Shanghai, China; Tokyo, Japan; Hyderabad, India; Munich, Germany; Sydney, Australia apple+1
